test_cases.test_name: ACT-01: gsd-tools activity-set writes current-activity.json atomically via writeFileSync
ACT-03: gsd-tools has activity-set command that writes current-activity.json
ACT-04: gsd-tools has activity-get command for reading current-activity.json
ACT-05: execute-phase workflow uses activity-set calls
ANNOT-01: All TLA+ model files contain @requirement annotations on properties
ANNOT-02: All Alloy model files contain @requirement annotations on assertions
ANNOT-03: All PRISM .props files contain @requirement annotations on properties
ANNOT-04: parseTLA extracts @requirement annotations from TLA+ content
CALIB-01: policy.yaml exists as the authoritative calibration source
CALIB-02: readPolicy parses policy.yaml with correct structure
CALIB-04: policy.yaml conservative_priors.tp_rate matches expected value
CI-01: package.json defines a test script

COMP-01: config-loader.js defines quorum_active in DEFAULT_CONFIG as an array

COMP-03 — check-provider-health.cjs reads quorum_active from nf.json config

TC1: no project config → returns valid config (from global or DEFAULT_CONFIG)
CONF-02 — ConfigLayer: config-loader.js implements two-layer merge with project precedence
CONF-03 — ConfigLayer: DEFAULT_CONFIG has quorum_commands as array of command names
CONF-04: nf-stop.js has fail-open try/catch wrapper with process.exit(0) in catch
CONF-05: config-loader.js readConfigFile returns null on malformed JSON with stderr warning
CONF-08: validateConfig resets non-object circuit_breaker to defaults
CONF-09: config-loader exports DEFAULT_CONFIG with circuit_breaker sub-object

exits non-zero and prints clear error when JAVA_HOME points to nonexistent path
DISP-05: parseVerdict extracts APPROVE from Mode B output
DRIFT-01 — CompleteDrift: pass when no schema file changed
